lab.name: Human Development, Indigenous Knowledge and Flourishing Lab
lab.tagline: Pioneering culturally grounded psychology for African wellbeing
lab.description: A pioneering research center dedicated to culturally grounded psychology, indigenous knowledge systems, and decolonizing mental health practices in African contexts.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To integrate traditional African wisdom with rigorous scientific methods to advance human flourishing across the continent and beyond, while decolonizing psychological practice and education.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To become Africa's leading research hub for culturally grounded psychology, producing evidence-based knowledge that honors indigenous wisdom while meeting global academic standards.

values.title: Cultural Authenticity
values.description: Honoring and integrating indigenous knowledge systems into psychological research and practice

values.title: Scientific Excellence
values.description: Maintaining rigorous research methodologies and evidence-based practices

values.title: Community Impact
values.description: Ensuring research translates into practical benefits for communities

values.title: Decolonization
values.description: Transforming psychology to be more inclusive and culturally relevant

director.name: Dr. Stephen Asatsa
director.title: Senior Lecturer & Head of Psychology Department
credentials: Registered & Licensed Psychologist (Kenya Counselors and Psychologists Board)
director.bio: Dr. Stephen Asatsa is a senior Lecturer and Head of Department of Psychology at the Catholic University of Eastern Africa with extensive experience in academic strategy and research. He is an experienced Consultant Psychologist registered and licensed by the Kenya Counselors and Psychologists Board and co-founder of BeautifulMind Consultants, a Kenyan mental health social enterprise.

focusAreas.title: Indigenous Psychology
focusAreas.description: Exploring and validating traditional African healing practices and knowledge systems

focusAreas.title: Cross-Cultural Development
focusAreas.description: Studying psychological development across diverse African contexts

focusAreas.title: Mental Health & Trauma
focusAreas.description: Addressing mental health challenges through culturally appropriate interventions

internationalFootprint.title: Global Research Network
internationalFootprint.description: Collaborating with institutions and researchers across multiple continents
